title: Arbitrary manual live relationship fall-through
problem: ticket-128 proved live concept linking for arbitrary manual_text sources. NM-4 pipeline still stops before relationships; build-relationships uses checksum-pinned mock fixtures for synthnote and generic diversity fallback for unknown manual_text.
acceptance_criteria: After live extract + link on an unmapped manual_text source, explicit live mode can draft relationships via Ollama.
At least one validated active relationship persists to the gitignored evidence DB.
Checksum-pinned synthnote mock paths remain deterministic.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove live relationship fall-through flag; retain ticket-127/128 calibration.
